## 📌 Code Studio Usage Declaration (Mandatory)

> Fill the "Selected Value" column only.  
> Do not modify other columns. CI validation depends on exact format.

| Field | Allowed Values | Selected Value |
|-------|---------------|---------------|
| Code Studio Used | Yes / No |  |
| Reason (Required if Code Studio Used = No) | Free text (1 line) / NA |  |
| Primary Use (Required if Yes) | Generate new code / Refactor / Tests / Bug fix / Docs / Review assistance / Other |  |
| Outcome (Optional) | Saved time / Neutral / Cost time |  |
| Blocker (Required if Outcome = Cost time) | Free text (1 line) / NA |  |
